task.summary: Add documentation and convert JSON to Uniform
Split into many files, add parallel read support, autoCreate and improve performance
Convert to Uniform and add autoCreate
Split files into many, fix a few bugs and update tests

Many optimizations and fixes
L1 cache, query result cache, adapter cache, cache key pooling, MANY_TO_ONE prefetch, parallel batch loading, deep/recursive prefetch, cache warming by ID, auto-behaviours, metrics, getRelationshipSize, and proper clear/shutdown lifecycle.

Fix missing functionality in DefaultSession, NetworkSession and FileSession
- NO_CACHE, BUFFERED_WRITE, LOG_OPERATIONS and CASCADE support in FileSession and NetworkSession - New methods like insertAll, updateAll, deleteAll, findAllById, async versions, etc in both Sessions
Fix @Named issues and JSON issues, and replace reflection with ServiceLoader

Fix @Named issues and JSON issues, add features
- Add JsonVersioned - Remove JsonIgnoreNulls
Improve the performance of SQLDatabaseParameters and loadFromDatabase
Improve the performance of SQLDatabaseParameters and relocations in codegen
Bump versions and prepare for maven central
Make relationship handler use LRU and make it tunable
Improve performance, cache eviction behavior and made it tunable

Many fixes and improvements:
- Eliminate getDeclaredConstructor() reflection - Improve the performance by reusing computations - Use `Types` instead of string matching for safer processing - Fix getters/setters beginning with `is` not working (i.e. boolean methods) and record-style methods. - Make TypeResolver a more trusted source of truth and skipping many checks (which is the intended behavior)
Fix many issues and replace reflection with codegen
Offload hot-path work to compile time generated code and fix JSON parameter issues
Fix test and compile time validator

MESSAGE.value: Improve the performance of SQLDatabaseParameters and loadFromDatabase
Improve the performance of SQLDatabaseParameters and relocations in codegen
Bump versions and prepare for maven central
Make relationship handler use LRU and make it tunable
Improve performance, cache eviction behavior and made it tunable

Many fixes and improvements:
- Eliminate getDeclaredConstructor() reflection - Improve the performance by reusing computations - Use `Types` instead of string matching for safer processing - Fix getters/setters beginning with `is` not working (i.e. boolean methods) and record-style methods. - Make TypeResolver a more trusted source of truth and skipping many checks (which is the intended behavior)
Fix many issues and replace reflection with codegen
Offload hot-path work to compile time generated code and fix JSON parameter issues
Fix test and compile time validator
